name: Emmett, V. Thomas
description: Emmett commanded respect from the day he entered college, and this respect has been deepened through association. Having keen appreciation he tolerates only the best. There is no question about where he stands on issues—look for the right side and you will find him. N. B.—While editing the Annual, he refrained from cussing out one to his face!!!!!!!!!!!!
text: Emmett commanded respect from the day he entered college, and this respect has been deepened through association. Having keen appreciation he tolerates only the best. There is no question about where he stands on issues—look for the right side and you will find him. N. B.—While editing the Annual, he refrained from cussing out one to his face!!!!!!!!!!!!

name: Ruth, Lipscomb
clubs: Undergraduate Representative Y. W. C. A. '21
description: Très petite is Ruth, but precious articles usually come in small packages. Like Cleopatra, she has Titian hair and gray eyes, is charming as well as intellectual, and has a voice like a nightingale. With her high scholarship, lovely character, and numerous accomplishments, she is a credit to this institution.
text: Très petite is Ruth, but precious articles usually come in small packages. Like Cleopatra, she has Titian hair and gray eyes, is charming as well as intellectual, and has a voice like a nightingale. With her high scholarship, lovely character, and numerous accomplishments, she is a credit to this institution.

name: Joe, H. Pannell
motto: "He faces life with a song."
clubs: Music Editor and Songwriter for Stanley Gardner Company
Music Director for Y. M. & Y. W. C. A.
text: "He faces life with a song."

name: Rivers, Robert F.
description: Bob possesses a gentle way of precipitating himself into our lives. He is quiet and unassuming, a gentleman with clear sound sense; has an intuitive perception of life and wise tolerance, which constitutes the secret of his being always on the right side. He has and applies the formula of success.
text: Bob possesses a gentle way of precipitating himself into our lives. He is quiet and unassuming, a gentleman with clear sound sense; has an intuitive perception of life and wise tolerance, which constitutes the secret of his being always on the right side. He has and applies the formula of success.

name: Rivers, Mrs. R. F.
description: If her bright eyes deep lights hold, If her curls have glints of gold, If cunning dimples you behold, That's Mrs. Rivers. If she is winsome, charming and gay, That's Mrs. Rivers own dear way, If she is smiling all the day, That's Mrs. Rivers.
text: If her bright eyes deep lights hold, If her curls have glints of gold, If cunning dimples you behold, That's Mrs. Rivers. If she is winsome, charming and gay, That's Mrs. Rivers own dear way, If she is smiling all the day, That's Mrs. Rivers.

name: Dunlap, M. D.
clubs: President State Y. M. C. A. Field Council
description: Ability to deliver the "goods" and an unselfish desire to give to the world his full share of service.
text: Ability to deliver the "goods" and an unselfish desire to give to the world his full share of service.

name: Wyatt, Leroy W.
motto: "A poet, orator and writer."
description: Leroy is a splendid student, ever faithful to duty, firm in his convictions, and always on the right side. He is ever thoughtful of the weak and unfortunate, ready at all times to lend a helping hand. Leroy says little, but thinks deeply, believing in the philosophy "the deeds are what count, and not words."
text:
"A poet, orator and writer."
Leroy is a splendid student, ever faithful to duty, firm in his convictions, and always on the right side. He is ever thoughtful of the weak and unfortunate, ready at all times to lend a helping hand. Leroy says little, but thinks deeply, believing in the philosophy "the deeds are what count, and not words."

name: Walker, Priscilla
motto: "The ideas for which she strives are always the highest."
description: Soft as the flow of the spring, gentle as the breeze of calmness, pure and sweet is Priscilla.
text:
"The ideas for which she strives are always the highest."
Soft as the flow of the spring, gentle as the breeze of calmness, pure and sweet is Priscilla.

name: Clanton, Dixie
motto: "Those about her read the perfect ways of honor."
clubs: Vice President, Y. W. C. A. '21
description: Your first thought when meeting Dixie is that she is "the sweetest thing that ever lived." A smile for all, a greeting glad, an amiable, jolly way has she.
text:
"Those about her read the perfect ways of honor."
Your first thought when meeting Dixie is that she is "the sweetest thing that ever lived." A smile for all, a greeting glad, an amiable, jolly way has she.

name: Bowen, Mrs. Geo. G.
motto: "Live your own romance."
clubs: Vice President of Mississippian Literary Society 5th and 6th term '23
Secretary of Mississippian Literary Society 1st and 2nd term '24
Member of Y. W. C. A. '22, '23, '24
text: "Live your own romance."

name: Suggs, Joel
motto: "Life is worth living if you work."
clubs: Member Y. M. C. A. Cabinet '22
text: "Life is worth living if you work."

name: Riley, M. Luke
clubs: Vice President and President, Prestonian Literary Society
President, Union County Club, Certificate Class
description: M. Luke Riley leaves the College as a student of great promise with a solid record of achievements behind him. He is an able debater and a good speaker; has a generous disposition. He has made many friends among the students.
text: M. Luke Riley leaves the College as a student of great promise with a solid record of achievements behind him. He is an able debater and a good speaker; has a generous disposition. He has made many friends among the students.

name: Mitchell, Joel W.
clubs: Joint winner, International Society Oratorical Contest '21
Y. M. C. A. Delegate to Blue Ridge '22
description: Mitchell has a keen sense of humor known only to those who look for the best in life, and this constitutes the basis of that continual smile. With an amicable spirit he mingles with all types of people.
text: Mitchell has a keen sense of humor known only to those who look for the best in life, and this constitutes the basis of that continual smile. With an amicable spirit he mingles with all types of people.

name: Mullins, Ruth
motto: "Shall show us how divine a thing A woman may be made."
text: "Shall show us how divine a thing A woman may be made."

name: Wiggins, C. H.
description: Henry is rather unassuming in his ways, yet stands as a bulwark for the right. He is as optimistic as a reserved nature permits. He is himself unselfish and dependable, having those qualities that make the structure of true friendship.
text: Henry is rather unassuming in his ways, yet stands as a bulwark for the right. He is as optimistic as a reserved nature permits. He is himself unselfish and dependable, having those qualities that make the structure of true friendship.

name: Boone, Musette
motto: "If you don't hitch your wagon to a star, you'll ride in the mud."
description: Once in a very long while there comes into your acquaintance a person who really is a friend. Happy is the one Musette calls friend. She not only has a mind ready for work but also has plenty of wit and humor. Success is certain to knock—Musette will hear its call.
text:
"If you don't hitch your wagon to a star, you'll ride in the mud."
Once in a very long while there comes into your acquaintance a person who really is a friend. Happy is the one Musette calls friend. She not only has a mind ready for work but also has plenty of wit and humor. Success is certain to knock—Musette will hear its call.

name: Conn, Clara
motto: "A great soul—will be strong to live as well as to think. Worth, courage, honor, these indeed, your sustenance and birthright are."
clubs: N. R. in Y. W. C. A.
text: "A great soul—will be strong to live as well as to think. Worth, courage, honor, these indeed, your sustenance and birthright are."

name: Mattox, O. A.
motto: "Never worry, never hurry."
description: Like most of our great men, Otis is a rural product. His college habits point towards success and happiness. He takes with him our best wishes for a bright and exceedingly prosperous future.
text:
"Never worry, never hurry."
Like most of our great men, Otis is a rural product. His college habits point towards success and happiness. He takes with him our best wishes for a bright and exceedingly prosperous future.

name: Shelton, L. A.
clubs: Vice President Y. M. C. A. '24
description: One of the best known and most liked students. His friendliness, helpfulness, and co-operative spirit entitle him to a first place in the annals of the College.
text: One of the best known and most liked students. His friendliness, helpfulness, and co-operative spirit entitle him to a first place in the annals of the College.

name: Mcdade, Hannah
clubs: Vice President Sherwood Bonner Literary Society '23
description: Hannah's beautiful character has won for her many friends at the college. She is carefree and joyously happy, yet sincere and very sympathetic to all. When she meets you, no matter how blue you are, that "Hello Sister" or "Hey Buddy" seems to always drive the cloud away. We love her and wish for her a prosperous future.
text: Hannah's beautiful character has won for her many friends at the college. She is carefree and joyously happy, yet sincere and very sympathetic to all. When she meets you, no matter how blue you are, that "Hello Sister" or "Hey Buddy" seems to always drive the cloud away. We love her and wish for her a prosperous future.

name: Kellum, Nell
description: Nell is, I fear, the class coquette, And her victims are many, you bet; She smiles on them all, Which causes their "fall," But she vows her heart is whole yet. Nell is adorably girlish, bewitchingly spontaneous, lovable, charming—in short, she is Nell, and therefore to be loved.
text: Nell is, I fear, the class coquette, And her victims are many, you bet; She smiles on them all, Which causes their "fall," But she vows her heart is whole yet. Nell is adorably girlish, bewitchingly spontaneous, lovable, charming—in short, she is Nell, and therefore to be loved.

name: Lindley, Williams
motto: "Truly it can be said of her, none knew her but to love her, none name her but to praise."
description: Linnie is gentle, loving, and loyal, a natural leader, beloved by faculty and students alike. There will be an "aching void" when she leaves us to join the rank and file of the teaching force of our state. Fortunate indeed will be the classroom where her unselfish spirit rules.
text:
"Truly it can be said of her, none knew her but to love her, none name her but to praise."
Linnie is gentle, loving, and loyal, a natural leader, beloved by faculty and students alike. There will be an "aching void" when she leaves us to join the rank and file of the teaching force of our state. Fortunate indeed will be the classroom where her unselfish spirit rules.

name: Charles, Ripley Johnson
motto: "Consistent persistence applied intelligently."
description: Charles has a warm place in our hearts because of his devotion to duty. He has a keen sense of humor, and behind that sincere face there shines the light of clear conscience never flickering with unworthy sentiments.
text:
"Consistent persistence applied intelligently."
Charles has a warm place in our hearts because of his devotion to duty. He has a keen sense of humor, and behind that sincere face there shines the light of clear conscience never flickering with unworthy sentiments.

name: Eva, Flurry
description: Joyous, laughing Eva came to enter the ranks of those who were wrestling with the problems of college life in September 1920. We believe she will carry with her into her new work that same charming personality and enthusiasm that has so endeared her to the hearts of all. As she slips from the ties that have been so close, our love and good wishes follow.
text: Joyous, laughing Eva came to enter the ranks of those who were wrestling with the problems of college life in September 1920. We believe she will carry with her into her new work that same charming personality and enthusiasm that has so endeared her to the hearts of all. As she slips from the ties that have been so close, our love and good wishes follow.

name: West, S. A.
motto: "Oh! What is the aim of our faithful friend West? To call us to work and to break up our rest. When intermission's too short, And couples must part, We're sorry to say he's a pest."
text: "Oh! What is the aim of our faithful friend West? To call us to work and to break up our rest. When intermission's too short, And couples must part, We're sorry to say he's a pest."

name: Garrett, Elizabeth
motto: "With a cheery smile for everyone And goodly assurance of work well done."
description: Elizabeth has a bright and pleasing personality and all who have learned to know her have by the same act learned to love her. On the whole Elizabeth is an all-round girl whom the Senior class is proud to include in its membership.
text:
"With a cheery smile for everyone And goodly assurance of work well done."
Elizabeth has a bright and pleasing personality and all who have learned to know her have by the same act learned to love her. On the whole Elizabeth is an all-round girl whom the Senior class is proud to include in its membership.

name: Polk, Icye
motto: "If a true friend you wish to make Choose Icye; she is the real kind. This chance you will surely take, For such a girl is hard to find."
description: Icye came to us from her home in Jeff Davis County at the beginning of the session of '21 and '22. From the very first she has shown the College Spirit, which every student appreciates. "As along the highway of life she goes, God bless the deeds that she sows."
text:
"If a true friend you wish to make Choose Icye; she is the real kind. This chance you will surely take, For such a girl is hard to find."
Icye came to us from her home in Jeff Davis County at the beginning of the session of '21 and '22. From the very first she has shown the College Spirit, which every student appreciates. "As along the highway of life she goes, God bless the deeds that she sows."

name: Calvert, Erlene
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer, Sherwood Bonner Literary Society
description: Erlene with her charming appeal Has humor she cannot conceal; With plenty of Pep, And in tennis a "rep"; While suitors galore to her kneel. It is difficult to express Erlene's charm. Here is the beauty of the noonday, gloriously honest, without a shadow of pretense or deceit. Nor do we love her alone for her beauty, for beneath the surface of her being lies a nature rare and lovable.
text: Erlene with her charming appeal Has humor she cannot conceal; With plenty of Pep, And in tennis a "rep"; While suitors galore to her kneel. It is difficult to express Erlene's charm. Here is the beauty of the noonday, gloriously honest, without a shadow of pretense or deceit. Nor do we love her alone for her beauty, for beneath the surface of her being lies a nature rare and lovable.

name: Hamil, D. O.
description: Hamil hailed from Walnut Grove, Leake County and first saw the bright lights of the College in the fall of '22. He has twice served the Platonian Society as reporter. We believe that he will make good in life through his application and determination.
text: Hamil hailed from Walnut Grove, Leake County and first saw the bright lights of the College in the fall of '22. He has twice served the Platonian Society as reporter. We believe that he will make good in life through his application and determination.

name: Downing, Lonnie Mae
description: With manner so gentle and sweet, With smiles she doth every one greet; Her eyes, softly dark, Look right in the heart Of all whom she chances to meet. Lonnie Mae is the kind of girl who is never too busy with her own duties to stop and help others—gentle, refined, unpretentious, one hundred percent efficient. Good things grow where she walks because she helps them grow.
text: With manner so gentle and sweet, With smiles she doth every one greet; Her eyes, softly dark, Look right in the heart Of all whom she chances to meet. Lonnie Mae is the kind of girl who is never too busy with her own duties to stop and help others—gentle, refined, unpretentious, one hundred percent efficient. Good things grow where she walks because she helps them grow.

name: Hester, Elmer
motto: "Vanish care and exit sorrow, Worry never, always hope; Take today, forget tomorrow."
description: Elmer is recognized by all who know her as one of the most amiable girls who ever attended the College. She possesses an unlimited amount of patience, energy, loyalty and, best of all, a "never give up" spirit.
text:
"Vanish care and exit sorrow, Worry never, always hope; Take today, forget tomorrow."
Elmer is recognized by all who know her as one of the most amiable girls who ever attended the College. She possesses an unlimited amount of patience, energy, loyalty and, best of all, a "never give up" spirit.

name: Stapleton, O. C.
motto: "The only road to success in every vocation of life is hard work, reinforced by righteous conduct."
text: "The only road to success in every vocation of life is hard work, reinforced by righteous conduct."

name: Broom, Annie
motto: "She has that caressing and exquisite grace—never bold, ever present—which only a few women possess."
description: From out of the heart of Utica there came to us in '22 a girl with a sweet disposition. Her personality and magnetism have made for her scores of friends among each successive student body.
text:
"She has that caressing and exquisite grace—never bold, ever present—which only a few women possess."
From out of the heart of Utica there came to us in '22 a girl with a sweet disposition. Her personality and magnetism have made for her scores of friends among each successive student body.

name: Plume, Oaks
motto: "Plume in our midst does belong,  To relate her good traits would take long;  She's a girl worth while,  For she's one who can smile  When everything goes dead wrong."
text: "Plume in our midst does belong,  To relate her good traits would take long;  She's a girl worth while,  For she's one who can smile  When everything goes dead wrong."

name: Stewart, J. V.
motto: "Take him for all and all, you will not find his like again."
description: J. V. is a splendid student, cheerful, energetic, possessed with rare intellectual powers, and by his amiable qualities he has won the esteem and admiration of all who know him.
text:
"Take him for all and all, you will not find his like again."
J. V. is a splendid student, cheerful, energetic, possessed with rare intellectual powers, and by his amiable qualities he has won the esteem and admiration of all who know him.

name: Austin, Elmer Louise
description: We have found in Elma a sweet lovable character, always ready and willing to help those who need her. Her wise counsel and stern advice have saved many from falling. We feel that we are indeed fortunate to have known and called Elma our friend.
text: We have found in Elma a sweet lovable character, always ready and willing to help those who need her. Her wise counsel and stern advice have saved many from falling. We feel that we are indeed fortunate to have known and called Elma our friend.

name: Le Rue, Cook
motto: "Lost no time to contradict her; Nor endeavor to convict her; Only take this rule along, Always to advise her wrong, And reprove her when she's right; She may then grow wise for spite."
clubs: Y. W. C. A. Cabinet 2 years
Vice President and Secretary Mississippian Literary Society
text: "Lost no time to contradict her; Nor endeavor to convict her; Only take this rule along, Always to advise her wrong, And reprove her when she's right; She may then grow wise for spite."

name: Katie, Todd
motto: "A blond is she, Busy as a bee; Always working, Never shirking."
description: Radiant happiness, a carefree and joyous heart, sincerity, and tender sympathy are some of the attributes that make us all love Katie.
text:
"A blond is she, Busy as a bee; Always working, Never shirking."
Radiant happiness, a carefree and joyous heart, sincerity, and tender sympathy are some of the attributes that make us all love Katie.

name: Phillips, Ola
description: No fairer flower in all the fair Magnolia State could be found. Ola is the same every day, no matter where you see her. There is one thing about Ola that is a mystery—that Smile; we don't know where she got it, but she brought it with her the day she came to the College and she has had it ever since.
text: No fairer flower in all the fair Magnolia State could be found. Ola is the same every day, no matter where you see her. There is one thing about Ola that is a mystery—that Smile; we don't know where she got it, but she brought it with her the day she came to the College and she has had it ever since.

name: Odom, H. P.
motto: "I am my mother's pride and joy, Because I am her only boy."
text: "I am my mother's pride and joy, Because I am her only boy."

name: Carter, Lillie Beatrice
motto: "To know her is to realize her worth."
description: Beatrice came from Noxubee County, and we have room for more of her kind. She is a faithful student of more than average ability. She entered college two years ago and leaves with a record that few are able to attain in so short a time. As a teacher she has already made good and has many friends. We predict a successful future for her.
text:
"To know her is to realize her worth."
Beatrice came from Noxubee County, and we have room for more of her kind. She is a faithful student of more than average ability. She entered college two years ago and leaves with a record that few are able to attain in so short a time. As a teacher she has already made good and has many friends. We predict a successful future for her.

name: Luker, Lola
motto: "A daughter of the gods, divinely tall, and most divinely fair."
description: Lola has a quiet, exclusive manner, but when one comes to know her, he finds a gentle personality full of sincerity and sweetness.
text:
"A daughter of the gods, divinely tall, and most divinely fair."
Lola has a quiet, exclusive manner, but when one comes to know her, he finds a gentle personality full of sincerity and sweetness.

name: Cooper, J. O.
description: We have found John Cooper to be congenial, considerate, and conscientious. His is a unique personality, combining both seriousness and humor within his giant stature. We are betting on "Honest John" and predict great things for him in the future.
text: We have found John Cooper to be congenial, considerate, and conscientious. His is a unique personality, combining both seriousness and humor within his giant stature. We are betting on "Honest John" and predict great things for him in the future.

name: Cork, Tessye
clubs: Vice President, Sherwood Bonner Literary Society
description: Tessye has won many friends in the short time that she has been with us. She is a splendid Y. W. C. A. worker, an excellent student, a star athlete, and a good mixer. She says that her ambition is to teach Mathematics, but we think that Cupid has made other plans for her.
text: Tessye has won many friends in the short time that she has been with us. She is a splendid Y. W. C. A. worker, an excellent student, a star athlete, and a good mixer. She says that her ambition is to teach Mathematics, but we think that Cupid has made other plans for her.

name: Mcmurtray, Kate
motto: "Ah! take a glance at our comrade hail me, And her sweet disposition we can never forget."
text: "Ah! take a glance at our comrade hail me, And her sweet disposition we can never forget."

name: Long, A. C.
motto: "In work or in play He is jolly and gay."
description: Of course this is "Red" Long. Long's charm lies in the reflection of his own good temperament. Nature made him what he is and has never made another; he is never too busy with his own duties to stop and help others with their problems. For he is "wise if I can judge of him and true he is as he hath proved himself."
text:
"In work or in play He is jolly and gay."
Of course this is "Red" Long. Long's charm lies in the reflection of his own good temperament. Nature made him what he is and has never made another; he is never too busy with his own duties to stop and help others with their problems. For he is "wise if I can judge of him and true he is as he hath proved himself."

name: Trimm, Camille
motto: "And as the bright sun glorifies the skies, So is her face illuminated with her eyes."
description: Trimm has endeared herself to all those who have known her during her stay here; and those who will remain after she has gone, as well as those who go with her, will miss her smile and her helpful attractive ways.
text:
"And as the bright sun glorifies the skies, So is her face illuminated with her eyes."
Trimm has endeared herself to all those who have known her during her stay here; and those who will remain after she has gone, as well as those who go with her, will miss her smile and her helpful attractive ways.

name: Storm, Josie
description: An absolutely irresistible mixture of bobbed hair, twinkling brown eyes, and dimples. Hers is a jolly, unselfish, glad-I'm-living disposition. It's fortunate her roommate has an ear for music, for Joe likes to lighten the process of "digging" by singing to the accompaniment of her ever-ready "uke".
text: An absolutely irresistible mixture of bobbed hair, twinkling brown eyes, and dimples. Hers is a jolly, unselfish, glad-I'm-living disposition. It's fortunate her roommate has an ear for music, for Joe likes to lighten the process of "digging" by singing to the accompaniment of her ever-ready "uke".

name: Tate, W. C.
description: Never discouraged, he nobly strives to attain opportunity for service, ignoring personal gain.
text: Never discouraged, he nobly strives to attain opportunity for service, ignoring personal gain.

name: Simmons, Nannie Ione
motto: "A big heart always wishing to do right, and beloved by everybody."
description: Here comes our loved friend "Nancy," with the love light dancing in her eyes—always the same sweet patient girl, never rushing carelessly through life. Ever willing to bear her share with Y. W. C. A. or any College activities. As she journeys through the trails of life, she will always be remembered by the class of '24.
text:
"A big heart always wishing to do right, and beloved by everybody."
Here comes our loved friend "Nancy," with the love light dancing in her eyes—always the same sweet patient girl, never rushing carelessly through life. Ever willing to bear her share with Y. W. C. A. or any College activities. As she journeys through the trails of life, she will always be remembered by the class of '24.

name: Elizabeth, Anding
description: Elizabeth is recognized by all who know her as one of the most lovable and dependable members of our class. When she is asked to serve on committees in any school activity, all are assured that she will do her part and do it well. She has proven a live-wire in all school affairs especially the Sherwood Bonner Literary Society.
text: Elizabeth is recognized by all who know her as one of the most lovable and dependable members of our class. When she is asked to serve on committees in any school activity, all are assured that she will do her part and do it well. She has proven a live-wire in all school affairs especially the Sherwood Bonner Literary Society.

name: Nina, B. Brewer
motto: "Sincere in thought, honest in action, With a heart ever kind and true."
description: Nina does not talk much, but says something when she does. She has a wonderful way of doing things; has completely mastered Domestic Art. She has a pleasant disposition, which makes those who know her love her.
text:
"Sincere in thought, honest in action, With a heart ever kind and true."
Nina does not talk much, but says something when she does. She has a wonderful way of doing things; has completely mastered Domestic Art. She has a pleasant disposition, which makes those who know her love her.

name: Mrs., J. V. Stewart
motto: "Her thoughts are pure, her faith strong."
description: Mrs. Stewart entered College in '22, after teaching five years in the public schools of Mississippi. No student in school has made a more profound impression on her classmates and instructors. She is a hard worker and believes in making college life a preparation for future endeavor. We predict a bright and successful future for her.
text:
"Her thoughts are pure, her faith strong."
Mrs. Stewart entered College in '22, after teaching five years in the public schools of Mississippi. No student in school has made a more profound impression on her classmates and instructors. She is a hard worker and believes in making college life a preparation for future endeavor. We predict a bright and successful future for her.

name: Tidwell, Jean
motto: "Hearts on her lips, and soul within her eyes; Soft as her clime, and sunny as her skies."
clubs: Y. W. C. A. Bible Committee
description: Jean—what a romantic name: serene, calm, unruffled, always with every strand of her glossy black hair in place, and a quiet winsome personality that wins the love of all who know her.
text:
"Hearts on her lips, and soul within her eyes; Soft as her clime, and sunny as her skies."
Jean—what a romantic name: serene, calm, unruffled, always with every strand of her glossy black hair in place, and a quiet winsome personality that wins the love of all who know her.

name: Ratliff, Aileen
motto: "As pure as a pearl. A noble and innocent girl."
description: Aileen is "fine"—because she is simply Aileen; and there is pure delight in knowing her. She is a favorite among both faculty and students, —has a rare sense of wit and humor.
text:
"As pure as a pearl. A noble and innocent girl."
Aileen is "fine"—because she is simply Aileen; and there is pure delight in knowing her. She is a favorite among both faculty and students, —has a rare sense of wit and humor.

name: Downing, Agnes
description: Agnes is one of the friendliest souls alive and is a girl above the average. She rather shrinks from the public eye, and it is the privilege only of those who know her best to enjoy her keen wit. With those gray eyes, sparkling, she manages always to have the last word to convulse the girls with some hit of her original humor. Too, we think of her as one of those quaint ladies, of olden days stepped out of her lace paper Valentine to delight us for a while.
text: Agnes is one of the friendliest souls alive and is a girl above the average. She rather shrinks from the public eye, and it is the privilege only of those who know her best to enjoy her keen wit. With those gray eyes, sparkling, she manages always to have the last word to convulse the girls with some hit of her original humor. Too, we think of her as one of those quaint ladies, of olden days stepped out of her lace paper Valentine to delight us for a while.

name: Hitt, Elizabeth
motto: "God made thee perfect."
text: "God made thee perfect."

name: Hood, B. S.
motto: "Her ways are ways of pleasantness, And all her paths are paths of peace."
text: "Her ways are ways of pleasantness, And all her paths are paths of peace."

name: Trantham, C. G.
description: We know "Nub" for his cheerful optimism, and his determination to obtain whatever he desires. By his ready smiles, pleasing disposition, and accommodating ways, C. G. has made everybody his friend. We believe he will deliver the goods in life's game.
text: We know "Nub" for his cheerful optimism, and his determination to obtain whatever he desires. By his ready smiles, pleasing disposition, and accommodating ways, C. G. has made everybody his friend. We believe he will deliver the goods in life's game.

name: Googe, G. W.
description: In Mrs. Googe are combined those qualities of power, of thoughtfulness, duty, strength and reserve which make that fairest and best of all God's creations—a true woman—who could ask for one to be more?
text: In Mrs. Googe are combined those qualities of power, of thoughtfulness, duty, strength and reserve which make that fairest and best of all God's creations—a true woman—who could ask for one to be more?
